name: Square
description_short: Square is a credit building provider based in San Francisco, California. Rated 2.1/5 with 533 Google reviews, reflecting limited customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Square is a credit building provider serving clients in San Francisco, California. With 533 Google reviews and a 2.1/5.0 rating, Square has built a significant presence in the local credit building market.

Operating as a corporate office, software company, Square provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit building solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Credit building services like Square in San Francisco help consumers who are starting fresh or recovering from credit setbacks. The most effective credit building programs report to all three major credit bureaus and provide tools to track progress over time. When comparing providers, look for transparent pricing, no hidden fees, and verified reporting to Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion.

Consumers in the San Francisco, California area who are considering Square should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit building provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
